commonLocalCollectorFinding.pattern: homepage and /ads.txt timed out from the local dashboard collector
commonLocalCollectorFinding.interpretation: Do not treat local timeout alone as missing AdSense setup or confirmed global outage.

candidates.externalHomepageEvidence: Search/open attempts returned unrelated .com/.co results, not authoritative current ezfunnel.kr proof. Local hardening package exists at D:/web/ezfunnelkr/tools/ezfunnel-adsense-approval-hardening.php, but live WP root/apply state is not verified.
candidates.nextGate: Confirm whether the local hardening package is installed on the live WordPress root before public proof or console submission.

snapshotRefresh.method: Carried forward only proof evidence whose site still has a transient AdSense or ads.txt collector error in the current dashboard snapshot; resolved sites were pruned.
